summary: Plan-only classification: keep #56619 as the open non-security canonical issue for the WhatsApp pairing approval notification gap; route the security-sensitive approved-pairing/contact-management issues #56621 and linked #48620 to central OpenClaw security handling. No close, merge, or fix PR actions are planned.

actions.reason: This is the clearest non-security canonical item in the cluster and remains open with source-level evidence of a narrow WhatsApp notification gap.
The item is security-sensitive and broader than #56619, so it should not be deduped or closed in this plan-mode backlog cleanup cluster.
The linked item is a security-sensitive broader contact and permission inventory request; quarantine it without letting it block classification of #56619.
